content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hello? Yes, hi... my daughter told me to call your office about something, but I'm not entirely sure what it was supposed to be. Something about setting an appointment, I think?
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes but thanks for calling to the point Orthopedic part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah
No, no, I'm Robert — Robert Walsh. Is this the doctor's office? My daughter said I needed to call about... well, I'm not quite sure, actually. Maybe my knee? It's been bothering me some.
The agent said: Yes, this is Pivot Point Orthopedics. We help with joint muscle and bone concerns.
Oh, okay, that sounds right. Yes, my knee's been giving me trouble — hurts when I walk sometimes. Is that what my daughter wanted me to call about, you think?
The agent said: your knee, or for your
Sorry, what was that? Could you repeat that last part? My hearing isn't what it used to be.
The agent said: Time, are you?
I'm sorry, I'm having trouble hearing you. Could you speak up a bit? What were you asking me?
The agent said: Are you calling about your?
Oh, yes — my knee! That's what's been bothering me. My daughter said to call, and I think it was about my knee pain.
The agent said: Me or for someone else. That's okay. Whenever you're ready. Just let me know if you're calling about your own knee or for someone else.
Oh! No, it's for me — Robert Walsh. It's my knee that's been hurting. I'm 78 years old, and my daughter thought I should get it checked out.
The agent said: Please tell me your date of birth.
March 3rd, 1947. That makes me 78 now.
The agent said: Just to confirm, I have your name as Robert Walsh and your date of birth as March, 3rd 1947.
Yes, that's right — Robert Walsh, March 3rd, 1947. That's correct.
The agent said: If so.
Yes, that's all correct. So... what happens next?
The agent said: Thank you. Could you please spell your first and last name for me?
Sure — R-O-B-E-R-T, and W-A-L-S-H. Robert Walsh.
The agent said: I have your phone number at 650-663-2777 and your date of birth as March, 3rd 1947.
Well, my phone number is actually 650-555-0412, not that other one. But yes, March 3rd, 1947 is correct.
The agent said: I can't proceed further right now but I can make sure our Clinic support team follows up with you.
Okay, that sounds fine. So they'll call me back about my knee then?
The agent said: Due to our patient support team, connecting you to a representative.
Alright, thank you. I'll wait to talk to someone then.
The agent said: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
Oh, okay then. Goodbye.
